articles.title: SEC SAYS LIQUID STAKING DOESN'T RUN AFOUL OF SECURITIES LAWS
articles.summary: The SEC's Division of Corporation Finance clarified in a non-binding staff statement that liquid staking, where users deposit covered crypto assets to receive receipt tokens, does not require securities-law disclosures as long as the assets aren't part of an investment contract. With nearly $67 billion in TVL across protocols like Lido, Jito, and Rocket Pool, the market saw only muted price changes after the announcement. The guidance emphasizes that liquid staking providers act as agents without entrepreneurial or managerial efforts in staking decisions. By following this statement, industry participants should avoid enforcement actions under current securities laws.

articles.title: SHARPLINK BOOSTS ETH HOLDINGS TO 522K, RAISES $265M IN A WEEK
articles.summary: SharpLink (Nasdaq: SBET) added 83,561 ETH in the week ending August 3, increasing total holdings to 521,939 ETH, up 19% week-over-week. The firm raised $264.5M in net proceeds via its ATM facility at an average ETH price of $3,634. Staking rewards now total 929 ETH since the firm launched its treasury strategy in June. Its proprietary “ETH Concentration” metric rose to 3.66, up 83% since launch, as SharpLink continues to position itself as the leading Ethereum-native treasury company.

articles.title: SLASH LAUNCHES GLOBAL USD: BORDERLESS BANKING WITHOUT THE BAGGAGE
articles.summary: Slash has launched Global USD in partnership with Base, offering international users U.S. bank accounts without needing an LLC, EIN, or facing sudden account shutdowns. Users get a real U.S. account and routing number in ~10 minutes using local documents, earn up to 4.5% cash rewards, and pay zero fees to receive USD or USDC. Slash has also introduced a free AI finance agent that tracks spending, flags duplicate charges, and cancels subscriptions.

articles.title: COINBASE TO ENABLE IN-APP TRADING FOR ALL BASE TOKENS
articles.summary: Coinbase is about to make every Base token, meme or utility, searchable and tradable by its ~8 million active users, removing the need for formal listings. Projects building on Base now just need attention, not exchange approval, to unlock retail access. The gate is open now it's a race for visibility.

articles.title: 90 DEFI-FOCUSED CT ACCOUNTS TO FOLLOW
articles.summary: Pink Brains dropped a curated list of 90 high-signal DeFi Twitter accounts, organized by category: Educational Content, Yield Farming & Trading Strategies, Podcasts & Media, Market Insights, and Airdrops. It includes a mix of key opinion leaders offering sharp analysis, yield strategy breakdowns, narrative detection, and protocol deep-dives.

articles.title: 24 RECENT ETHEREUM ECOSYSTEM LAUNCHES
articles.summary: Over the past few weeks, the Ethereum ecosystem has seen major integrations and supply growth: Robinhood went onchain via Arbitrum, Base launched Base Pay and its onchain app, and total stablecoin supply across Ethereum L1/L2 topped $140 billion. Institutional momentum accelerated with ConsenSys' “Trustware” report, Electric Capital's ETH advocacy, a record $726.6 million single-day ETH ETF inflow, and treasury moves by BitDigital and BitMNR. Key infrastructure and app innovations shipped, including FocusTree's 500k daily users on Starknet, Boundless's ZK execution layer beta, EigenLayer's slashed-funds redistribution, and the Talos AI agent on Arbitrum. The ecosystem also celebrated Ethereum's 10th anniversary globally, released a new documentary, and saw expanded real-world deployments, from Google Cloud ZK identity proofs and PayPal crypto payments to Morpho Labs' $2 billion TVL on Base.

articles.title: BASE APP'S EARLY METRICS
articles.summary: Base App transforms Coinbase's wallet into a crypto “super app,” merging self-custodial wallet functions, Farcaster-powered SocialFi via Zora NFTs, USDC-based PayFi with 1% cashback, and integrated mini-apps. Since rebranding in July, daily token launches surged from 4k to 15k, trading volume rose from $1M to $6M, and creator rewards jumped to $30k/day, with over 8k Zora smart wallets now active. Partnerships with Zora, Noice, and Clanker, along with an independent security council and a friendlier US regulatory climate, fuel speculation of a future $BASE token.

articles.title: FRAXNET: THE FAT STABLECOIN THESIS
articles.summary: A “Fat Stablecoin” model flips the traditional banking and stablecoin yield capture by programmatically redistributing real-time frxUSD yield directly to holders under GENIUS-compliant regulations. Serving as the account layer atop L1 Fraxtal, it enables instant minting, redemption, yield streaming, and plug-and-play integrations without lockups or custody complexity. Targeting the $7.5 trillion money market fund sector and broader $20 trillion U.S. M2 supply, FraxNet eliminates daily settlement delays and intermediaries to unlock new cash-management primitives. By aligning incentives and offering transparent, auditable distribution, frxUSD is positioned as a superior institutional cash infrastructure that drives mainstream adoption.

articles.title: THE WASHINGTON WALL STREET INDUSTRIAL COMPLEX, EXPOSED BY CRYPTO
articles.summary: The U.S. banking system is a “protected” industry that functions as a workaround for government surveillance, shielded by regulation, bailouts, and chartering hurdles.

articles.title: CRYPTO GIVES YOU WALL STREET-LEVEL DATA FOR FREE
33-MINUTE BASE CHAIN OUTAGE
articles.summary: Base Chain experienced a 33-minute-long outage last night due to an automated handoff to an unhealthy sequencer in its high-availability cluster.

articles.title: ETHEREUM APPS HAVE GENERATED $26.8B IN CUMULATIVE FEES
articles.summary: Since launch, applications on Ethereum have generated ~$26.8B in user-paid fees.
